title: Thailand Grill Curry Vegetarian
description: A quick-fix Ukrainian dish featuring rich and juicy Thai red curry paste combined with vegetables for a vegetarian-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: 1 yellow bell pepper, cut into strips
1 red bell pepper, cut into strips

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add curry paste and garlic; cook for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add shallots, bell peppers, and tomato can to the skillet with juice. Stir in vegetable broth, soy sauce, sugar, and cumin. Bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let the mixture cook until vegetables are tender, approximately 10 minutes.
Fold in cashews and stir well to coat them evenly in the curry sauce. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until hot throughout.
Serve over steamed rice or as a side dish with noodles.
